name: Ghost Meets Girl - A Mayakashi's Manuscript
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>逢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>麗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>譚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>語</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がたり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Tale of the Meeting with the Splendid Spectral Grace - A Mayakashi Story
desc: During the Main Phase: Target 1 Zombie Synchro Monster you control; Special Summon 1 of your Zombie monsters with the same Attribute, that is banished or in your GY, but banish it during the End Phase, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except Zombie monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Meets Girl - A Mayakashi's Manuscript" per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Target 1 Zombie Synchro Monster you control; Special Summon 1 of your Zombie monsters with the same Attribute, that is banished or in your GY, but banish it during the End Phase, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, except Zombie monsters. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Meets Girl - A Mayakashi's Manuscript" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
